title: Puella Magi Madoka Magica
sourceNotes: 12-episode 2011 anime (SHAFT) is the original work. Paired with the Hanokage manga (12 chapters / 3 vols, 2011) which is a near-1:1 manga retelling of the anime. Multiple spinoff manga (Oriko Magica, Kazumi Magica, etc.) and the Rebellion movie are separate AniList entries.
